title: Add security and correctness linters to golangci-lint
summary: External review feedback from sourcery-ai[bot] addressed with three changes: (1) replaced 8 per-line //nolint:gosec G101 annotations in test files with a single golangci-lint exclusion rule in .golangci.yml, (2) changed SimulateMariaDBReady replicas parameter from int to int32 eliminating the cast and G115 suppression, (3) documented three new review patterns from the external feedback. All modules pass golangci-lint cleanly.

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
